Event: Wonderful Mole-opoly
Event Date: 01/06/2022
Sage Bot Item Code: B15


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Olympian Bow

When attacking, has a 20-22% chance of dealing 75-90% damage to a group of enemies.

Each of the bow wielder's shots has a 20% chance of striking the target with fear for 2 sec. When the fear wears off, that enemy explodes. All enemies within a small radius take damage equal to 15% of their max health, while all allies hit by the explosion have 15% of their max health restored.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
